title: An Inn in Tokyo
overview: An unemployed Japanese man and his two sons wander the industrial flatlands of Depression-era Tokyo, until he chances upon an old friend and befriends a woman and her daughter, who are in a similar predicament.

trailers.title: AN INN IN TOKYO (Tokyo no yado), 1935
